resources.string: HeadacheInsight is not a medical device and does not diagnose. It uses your API connection for transcription and structured analysis.
Use this app to collect structured information for yourself and for clinician conversations.
Optional structured analysis through your server. You can add your OpenAI / ChatGPT API key later in Settings.
Store only city or region snapshots when they matter.
Needed only if you want cloud processing for files and images.
